---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability for WearPod
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary / 需求概述

Describe the feature you want in one or two sentences.

请用一两句话描述你希望增加的能力。

## Problem to solve / 要解决的问题

What user problem does this solve?

它要解决什么用户问题？

## Proposed solution / 你的方案

Describe the behavior or flow you expect.

描述你期望的交互或功能流程。

## Alternatives considered / 可替代方案

List any alternative ideas you considered.

## Additional context / 补充信息

Anything else that may help evaluate the request.
